name: @chart-review/eval-span-iaa
description: Span-level inter-annotator agreement for NER tasks. Pairs two reviewers' span lists by tuple-match (note_id, start, end, entity_type, concept_name) first, then IoU≥0.5 within (note_id, entity_type) as fallback. Emits hard / soft / boundary / miss kinds and per-entity-type F1 + macro κ-style headline number. Pure functions; no I/O.
